description: HSV-APOE4-NLRP3 axis in Alzheimer's disease. LLMs commonly miss: gene-virus interactions, CNS penetration differences between antivirals, inflammasome mechanisms, and tau's antimicrobial function.

facts.context: APOE4 carriers with HSV-1 reactivation have Alzheimer's risk increased by:
In APOE4-negative individuals, HSV-1 seropositivity affects Alzheimer's risk:
distractors: increases risk 3-4 fold same as APOE4 carriers

facts.context: APOE2 vs APOE4 differ at amino acid position 158 by:
distractors: both have Cys158 (differ at position 112 only)

facts.context: Adibelivir (IM-250) brain/plasma ratio compared to pritelivir is:
Valacyclovir in the VALAD trial for HSV-seropositive early AD patients:
facts.truth: failed to slow decline (cognitive scores worsened vs placebo)
distractors: showed modest benefit in APOE4 subgroup

facts.context: APOE4 activates the NLRP3 inflammasome through:
Tau hyperphosphorylation in response to HSV-1 infection serves as:
facts.truth: antimicrobial defense (binds viral capsids, neutralizes infectivity)

facts.context: TREM2 R47H variant affects HSV-1 infection by:
facts.truth: impairing microglial antiviral response (increased viral replication)
distractors: having no effect on viral dynamics

facts.context: Recombinant zoster vaccine (Shingrix) reduces dementia risk by:
MCC950 NLRP3 inhibitor in HSV-infected 5xFAD mice:
facts.truth: reduced amyloid burden and cognitive decline

facts.context: HSV helicase-primase inhibitors differ from nucleoside analogs by:
facts.truth: not requiring viral thymidine kinase activation
distractors: being less potent against resistant strains

facts.context: APOE2 homozygotes have Alzheimer's risk compared to E3/E3:
The AS01 adjuvant in shingles and RSV vaccines affects dementia risk:
facts.truth: reduces risk regardless of target pathogen (adjuvant effect)
distractors: has no effect independent of antigen

facts.context: HSV-1 ICP27 protein in Alzheimer's brains colocalizes with:
APOE4 microglia compared to APOE2/E3 microglia show:
facts.truth: exaggerated immune response with reduced Abeta clearance
distractors: suppressed immune response with normal clearance
normal immune response with enhanced clearance
